problem id: b16455a2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  10001111 -> 00110011
  00001010 -> 10010110
  11111011 -> 01101101
  10110100 -> 10111001
  00011000 -> 10011100
  11101101 -> 11110111
  11100011 -> 00001111
  00111101 -> 10101100
  10110001 -> 00001101

query: 11001011
predicted answer: 10101011
